mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id, author_name, content, private_num, confirm, reg_dt FROM freeboard_comment WHERE private_num = #{privateNum} ORDER BY reg_dt ASC
SELECT id, author_id, author_name, content, private_num, confirm, reg_dt FROM freeboard_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard_comment WHERE private_num = #{privateNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO freeboard_comment (author_id, author_name, content, private_num, confirm, reg_dt) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{content}, #{privateNum}, #{confirm}, NOW())
